$schema: Ionis brand color tokens — see references/visual_system.md for usage rules

raspberry.role: key brand color, logo, must be visibly featured on every slide

magenta.role: primary partner; interchangeable with raspberry as the featured color

orange.role: tertiary primary, warm accent for stat blocks and gradients

secondary_tints._usage: backgrounds only, always paired with a primary

cool_gray_1.role: soft white substitute; wing watermark color

secondary_accents._usage: typography, icons, rules, frames only. Never a slide's dominant color. Never over either red.

cool_gray_11.role: default body text color. Never over either red — use black instead.

white.role: essential foil — even though not in the palette

black.role: for body text over Raspberry or Magenta only (where Cool Gray 11 is disallowed)

ink.role: near-black used in HTML decks for default heading color

must: Raspberry or Magenta visibly featured on every slide (not just the logo)
Secondary tints always paired with a primary color somewhere on the surface
Solid colors only — gradients (color blends within a single shape, text fill, or bar) are not permitted by the current brand book
never: Secondary Blue, Secondary Green, or Bright Yellow over either red
Cool Gray 11 over either red — use black
Secondary colors (Blue, Green, Bright Yellow, Cool Gray 11) as a slide's dominant color
Linear or radial gradients in card backgrounds, top bars, title underlines, text fills, icons, or any other surface
